description_long: This object is a pair of fitted pants designed for an adult, featuring a modern, streamlined silhouette. The pants have a mid-rise waist with a defined waistband and a front fly closure, likely secured by a button and zipper. There are subtle seam details and reinforced sections around the thighs and knees, suggesting a functional or protective design, possibly for urban or active use. The back of the pants includes two welt-style pockets, adding to the tailored appearance. The material appears to be a synthetic or technical fabric, providing both flexibility and durability. The overall look is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A pair of fitted, modern adult pants with reinforced seams and welt pockets, made from a sleek technical fabric. The design is minimalistic and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the waistband, fly closure, and reinforced thigh seams.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the contoured fit and seam details along the leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two welt pockets and the tailored seat area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible seam and paneling details.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted technical pants with reinforced seams and welt pockets
